scripts.perf:check: npm run vite:build && npm run perf:bundle && npm run perf:bench && npm run perf:bench-compare
scripts.sbom:rust: cd src-tauri && cargo install --quiet --locked cargo-cyclonedx && cargo cyclonedx --format json --override-filename sbom-rust
scripts.sbom: npm run sbom:npm && npm run sbom:rust
